title: test_jwt_token_obtainment
description: Verify that the API endpoint /api/v1/auth/token/ correctly issues a JWT token pair when valid username and password are provided, and rejects invalid credentials.

title: test_jwt_token_refresh
description: Verify that the API endpoint /api/v1/auth/token/refresh/ correctly refreshes the JWT access token when a valid refresh token is provided, and handles invalid or expired tokens properly.

title: test_employee_creation_and_listing
description: Verify that the /employees/ endpoint allows creating a new employee with valid data and lists all employees correctly with appropriate access control.

title: test_attendance_records_retrieval
description: Verify that the /attendance/ endpoint returns accurate attendance records for employees, including integration with ZKTeco devices and correct handling of check-in/out data.

title: test_leave_request_submission_and_listing
description: Verify that the /leaves/ endpoint allows employees to submit leave requests and lists leave requests correctly with proper approval workflow enforcement.

title: test_payroll_data_retrieval
description: Verify that the /payrolls/ endpoint returns accurate payroll data including salary components and deductions for authorized users.

title: test_product_listing_in_inventory
description: Verify that the /api/v1/products/ endpoint lists all products correctly with accurate stock and supplier information.

title: test_task_creation_and_listing
description: Verify that the /api/v1/tasks/ endpoint allows creating new tasks and lists existing tasks with correct assignment and progress tracking.

title: test_meeting_listing
description: Verify that the /api/v1/meetings/ endpoint lists scheduled meetings correctly including attendee information and meeting notes.

title: test_ai_chat_with_gemini
description: Verify that the /api/v1/ai/chat/ endpoint allows users to interact with Google Gemini AI chat service and returns relevant AI-generated responses.
